name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan requires a fundamental change in the core algorithm (switching from SAC to PPO) and a change in the state representation (using raw 3D states instead of the angle recovery used in the old plan). Since the training, evaluation, and analysis steps are all tied to these specific algorithmic and implementation choices, none of the previous execution results can be reused. The entire pipeline must be re-implemented and re-executed.
